sections.paragraph:
- Original: πολυτελής

- Transliteration: Poluteles

- Phonetic: pol-oo-tel-ace'

- Definition:

1. precious

a. requiring very great outlay, very costly

b. excellent, of surpassing value

- Origin: from G4183 and G5056

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G4183 and G5056; extremely expensive: - costly very precious of great price.
